    Monster Breeder

    Choose how to begin. Press ESC during play to return to this menu.

    Custom Game

    Food shortage before the new season

    Distribute this season's food

    Set how much food each monster is to receive at the lair, or reduce the treasure spend target to adjust every allocation automatically. Automatic changes are proportional to food need and favour monsters with fewer fat reserves. Any amount above the captive-macrofauna allowance and stored excess meat is bought by selling whole treasure units. Treasure nearest the human entry point is sold first. Meat bought with indivisible excess treasure value is stored for future seasons.

    Reducing this automatically redistributes the resulting food among all monsters.

    Monster Import / Export

    Share complete authoritative monster records as versioned JSON files. Import and export are available only between seasons.

    Export monsters

    Select one or more monsters, then choose a destination folder.

    Import monsters

    Choosing files immediately starts the import; no second button is required.

    The imported monster receives a new local identity, retaining its genome, age, health, fertility, pedigree summary and appearance-generating state.

    Saved games

    Save current game?

    The current game will be abandoned. Would you like to save it first?
